name: Bina Bangsa School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Arjuna Selatan Kav. 87, Kebon Jeruk, Jakarta Barat 11530, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Christian international school with multiple Jakarta campuses. Cambridge curriculum. Mid-range fees. Active Christian community.
paragraphs: Christian international school with multiple Jakarta campuses. Cambridge curriculum. Mid-range fees. Active Christian community.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.7K – US$9.3K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Multiple campuses, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Libraries, Sports facilities.

metaDescription: Bina Bangsa School (West Jakarta). Christian international school with multiple Jakarta campuses. Cambridge curriculum. Mid-range fees. Active Christian community.…
